description: Download PDB structure 2SOD (bovine Cu,Zn superoxide dismutase homodimer) and generate an electrostatic surface potential visualization. Identify the positively charged active site funnel and surrounding charged residues that guide the superoxide substrate. Render a high-resolution figure and save to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/sod1_electrostatic.png. Write a report to ~/PyMOL_Data/sod1_electrostatic_report.txt containing: a list of positively charged residues near the active site, a list of negatively charged residues near the active site, a description of the charge distribution pattern around the active site channel, and how this relates to substrate guidance. Pay special attention to identifying the key arginine residue critical for guidance.
